title: Forum Ventures - October 2025 Special Opportunity
additional_benefits: Spot in Forum Ventures' pre-seed accelerator
application_method: Submit deck through form (no warm intro required)
notes: Olivia O'Sullivan announced she's backing 3 founders in October with no warm intro required
careerspan_relevance: High - SaaS focus aligns with Careerspan's platform model

title: LAUNCH Fund by Jason Calacanis
application_method: Apply on their website - accepts cold submissions
notes: Known for reviewing cold submissions and responding to founders
careerspan_relevance: Medium - Broad focus on early-stage startups

title: Geek Ventures - Immigrant Founders Focus
notes: Specifically focused on immigrant founders in the US. Founder has track record with two 100x exits and seed investment in a decacorn

title: Village Global - Reid Hoffman Backed
notes: Chaired by Reid Hoffman (LinkedIn co-founder), broad early-stage focus with global reach
careerspan_relevance: High - Reid Hoffman's expertise in professional networks aligns with Careerspan

title: GGW Ventures - Late Seed & Series A+
application_method: Apply on website - accepts cold submissions
additional_benefits: Access to Go Global World community (described as invaluable by post author)
notes: Later stage than most on this list. Also runs Go Global World community
careerspan_relevance: Medium - May be appropriate for later stage funding rounds
